To: Lewis Preston
Subject / Title
Re: Senator Bumpers' Letter

Withdrawn by
Date
Salma Berrada El Azizi
July 31, 2025
Archives 01 (March 2017)
January 6, 1992
Mr. Lewis Preston:
Lew,
Re: Senator Bumpers' Letter
I prepared the attached letter to Senator Dale Bumpers in response to his letter of December 19 to you in which he recommends Mr. Jean Luc Jeanory for Bank employment.
Mr. Jeanory is a French national who is interested in a vice-presidential position with the Bank. He is currently a Division Chief/Director in UNIDO in Paris. As you know, the Bank rarely recruits externally at the senior levels. Furthermore, preliminary feedback from our Paris Office indicates that there may be some issues about his performance at UNIDO. This is not an easy thing to track down. But we are discretely doing some further reference checking. In the meantime for obvious reasons, the letter to the Senator doesn't promise anything but a follow up.
I would be happy to sign the letter if you prefer.
fig/Plage Bilsel Alisbah
Attachment :unselected: :unselected:
